# Extracao: Secrets of leverage and scale

- **Fonte:** Secrets of leverage and scale.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT

---

﻿MINI-MODULE SECRETS OF LEVERAGE AND SCALE

Welcome to the Secrets of Leverage and Scale. Learn how to grow and scale your business without working yourself to death.

1 Introduction [17 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to the concepts of leverage and scale; how to grow your business without growing the time that you spend in your business.

2 How to get Leverage [21 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about some of the most important aspects of leverage, including your relationship to your time and productivity, and how to make sure you're focused on the things that are going to make an impact in your business.

3 How to Scale [22 minutes]
This lesson is all about how to strategically scale your business, including the importance of growing your team.

4 How to get the Life you Want [14 minutes]
In order to grow and scale your business, you need to be intentional about going after what you want and saying no to the things you don't want. It starts with understanding the concept of opportunity cost. That's what you'll learn about in this lesson.

5 Conclusion [8 minutes]
This is a wrap-up of the lessons covered in Secrets of Leverage and Scale.
